rationale: The cited paper appears once in the discussion section as part of a list of prior studies showing that firms can adjust marketing actions in response to nutrition-related policies. The citing paper uses it as a supporting example for a general point (that soda taxes can reduce promotion frequency and depth), not as a basis for its identification strategy, hypotheses, measures, or core causal interpretation. There is no distinct, paper-specific integration of the cited study beyond this contextual mention.
